content:
The Six Steps
—
How to refine and develop your work


Why This Works

✅ Maintains McKee as the master framework → Story remains the central organizing principle.
✅ Distributes McCloud’s two books logically → Ensures all key chapters are covered in a meaningful way.
✅ No module is overloaded → Each section has one McKee lesson, one McCloud lesson, a comparison, and two activities.
✅ McCloud chapters are strategically split → Larger chapters (like The Six Steps and Blood in the Gutter) are reused in sections where relevant.
context: From document: Aligning McKee’s Story with McCloud’s Understanding Comics — chunk 38 (chunk 38/39)
